LAW AND MOTION 302,PLAINTIFF JANE DOE'S MOTION FOR NEW TRIAL. PLAINTIFF'S MOTION FOR NEW TRIAL IS DENIED. "PLAINTIFF REQUESTS A NEW TRIAL ON THE GROUND THAT THE INCORRECT LIMITATIONS PERIOD WAS APPLIED..." (MEMO. 1:5-6; SEE ALSO RPLY. 1:2-3 ["A SINGLE QUESTION OF LAW"].) THIS HAS ALREADY BEEN EXHAUSTIVELY BRIEFED AND ARGUED AND THE MOTION PROVIDES NOTHING NEW. THE PRIOR BRIEFS AND ORDERS ARE INCORPORATED BY REFERENCE. PREVAILING PARTY TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER THAT IS VERBATIM WITH THE COURT'S RULING AND IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312.JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER JR., CLERK: M. GOODMAN, NOT REPORTED. (302/RBU)

calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-19-2023 Off Calendar

Amended Notice Of Motion For New Trial
Off Calendar Nov-06-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF JANE DOE'S Motion For New Trial.

Plaintiff's motion for new trial is denied. "Plaintiff requests a new trial on the ground that the incorrect limitations period was applied..." (Memo. 1:5-6; see also Rply. 1:2-3 ["a single question of law"].) This has already been exhaustively briefed and argued and the motion provides nothing new. The prior briefs and orders are incorporated by reference.

Prevailing party to submit a proposed order that is verbatim with the Court's ruling and in compliance with CRC 3.1312.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/RBU)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-24-2023 Continued To Nov-15-23 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER to COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Aug-24-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances (in-person):
Pamela Glazner, Esq. 650-369-8900 Emmanuel Law Group; Jenny Smith, Esq. 650-368-2588 for Plaintiff.
Ira Leshin, Esq. Brian Sweeney, Esq 650-212-0001 Anderlini & McSweeney LLP for Defendant.
Court reporter: Raquel Sharp, CSR #.10619, 925-226-8222, raquelsharp@transcriptlegal.com, reported. (via zoom)

ARGUED. Ms. Glazner argues 366.2 and 340.1. The Court shares its views. Mr. Leshin responds and cites People v Fuentes. (as fully reported in the court reporter's notes/transcript) The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEFENDANT CATHY CHO's DEMURRER to COMPLAINT

Taken Under Submisson.***

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: M. Goodman, Court reporter: Raquel Sharp, CSR #.10619, 925-226-8222, raquelsharp@transcriptlegal.com, Reported. (302/rbu)

***After the hearing, the Court signs an order. (see scanned order for details)***
